positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a whimsical celestial constellation. A stylized, abstract representation of the Milky Way forming geometric lines and glowing nebula clouds surrounding a central, glowing crescent moon and a group of interconnected stylized stars. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, sapphire blue, luminous gold, and crisp white. Clean, thick linework with high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed yet stylized silhouette, centered composition, flat graphic design aesthetic, symmetrical balance, vaporwave celestial art style.
negative: photo, realistic, photorealism, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, low quality, noise, messy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, complex background, grain
